libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. The reported failure is from tests using removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs; adding pekko-actor-typed will not restore those classes because the supported typed API is under org.apache.pekko.actor.typed and is a different artifact/scope.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Pekko documentation recommends pekko-testkit for conventional actor unit tests, but direct coverage can still be written with ActorSystem, Props, AbstractActor, dispatchers, configuration, scheduling, serialization helpers, and related pekko-actor APIs.
Existing 1.1.5 tests that cover classic TypedActor must be replaced or removed for 2.0.0-M1 because the classes are absent from the resolved jar.

The artifact POM depends on scala-library 2.13.18 while the repository scaffold currently uses the shared Scala 2 compiler version; local Gradle verification remains authoritative if Scala compiler-version issues appear.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 resolves only scala-library and config as normal dependencies, and meaningful classic Actor coverage is reachable with the artifact alone.
